settings.heading: book reviews
settings.subtext:
every book on this page has been read, rated, and actually recommended by bybookishbabe.

spice levels, darkness ratings, tropes, and the honest take - no filler, no algorithm, no books i haven't personally finished.

if it's here, it earned its place.
